hero.headline: Clothes cut for long light and longer dinners.
hero.subtext: Twelve pieces. One atelier. No restocks.

items.title: Provenance printed inside
items.desc: Every garment carries its mill, cutter and sewing date on the inner label. Ask us anything about any seam.

items.title: Delivery, wrapped in paper
items.desc: Dispatched within two days in tissue and twine, never plastic. Carriage is $9 flat, free over $300.

items.title: Returns, without a sigh
items.desc: Thirty days, worn indoors is fine. If the fit is close, book the atelier and we will alter it instead.

about.body: Maison Iris is a local business built on quality work and word-of-mouth. We keep it simple: show up on time, do it properly, charge fairly. Most of our customers come back — and bring their friends.

items.name: R. Sharma
items.quote: Professional from start to finish. Exactly what was promised, when it was promised.

items.name: A. Fernandes
items.quote: Fair price, quality work. Already recommended them twice.

items.name: Custom Tailoring
features: Fits perfected over a fitting or two.

items.name: Designer Wear
features: Limited pieces you won't see twice.

items.a: Yes — local delivery and pickup slots are available.

items.q: Can I return or exchange items?
items.a: Unused items in original packaging can be exchanged within 7 days.
Tell us what you need — we confirm availability and timing.
